sourceSummary.oneLine: Internal part approval sheet for material code AMI63-03025A, E2X_PCB_CENTER_EMI_ABSORBER, used with model 2G DETECTOR.
sourceSummary.officialUse: Supports approval and control of a supplied mechanical/EMI absorber part, including drawing dimensions, vendor, EC history, and restricted substance requirement.
keyPoints: Material code is AMI63-03025A and description is E2X_PCB_CENTER_EMI_ABSORBER.
Model is listed as 2G DETECTOR and vendor is K-WON Corporation.
Specification checks list width 109 ± 0.5 mm and height 50 ± 0.5 mm, both with result OK.
EC history records Rev. 00 dated 22.06.03 with comment 신규 승인.
The part must not contain substances specified in 00Q2-0083K.
